rulings.Case Title: CORNELIUS DESPANIE VS. DEBBIE ELLIS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 29, 2013, line 9. DEFENDANT DEBBIE ELLIS' MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED. Amended Complaint improperly based on "3 Day Notice" served after this action was filed. Plaintiff failed to seek leave of Court to file a Supplemental Complaint. = (501/EHG)

rulings.Case Title: MITCH KEIL et al VS. RALPH SILBERMAN et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, April 29, 2013, line 10. DEFENDANT RALPH SILBERMAN'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT DENIED. Defendant fails to meet his burden under CCP 473(b). No mistake, inadvertence or excusable neglect shown re" failure to oppose Motion for Summary Judgment and appear at April 10, 2013 hearing. No proposed pleadings/papers attached either in response to discovery motions or to Motion for Summary Judgment. = (501/EHG)
